_comment: Machine-readable lock for ELEVM's external bootstrap inputs. Consumed by scripts/env_doctor.py and (from Step 2 onward) the bootstrap tooling. Documented in scripts/vectors/SOURCES.md. Do not duplicate these literals elsewhere; update this file and let consumers read it.

execution_specs._comment: Legacy BlockchainTests fixtures live under <root>/tests/fixtures/ethereum_tests, an independent nested checkout (see ethereum_tests below), not an execution-specs submodule.

ethereum_tests._comment: Ignored by execution-specs' .gitignore; not tracked as a Git submodule of execution-specs.

eest._comment_env_var: EEST_ROOT names the top-level install directory containing the archive and its extracted fixtures/ tree. It is distinct from scripts/check.sh's ELEVM_FIXTURES, which instead points directly at a tier's leaf fixture directory (and already defaults to <EEST_ROOT>/fixtures/blockchain_tests for --bls). The two variables are not interchangeable.

python_oracle._comment: This records only the currently-known-good versions used by scripts/gen-bls-consts.py. The complete transitive dependency lock is Step 4 work.
